request.subject: Second office batch
request.body: We may need 12 more laptops for the same rollout. Please use the same kind of option if it worked for the first batch, and include support.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.summary: Extracted customer, product category, quantity, urgency, location, and missing fields.

agents.name: Planner Agent
agents.summary: Created a quote-to-response task graph with memory, catalog, risk, approval, and learning steps.

agents.name: Memory Agent
agents.summary: Retrieved customer preferences and approved policies from persistent memory.

memories.text: Prefers Dell laptops for new office rollouts.
Prefers conservative delivery promises over fastest possible estimates.
Usually accepts 3-year onsite support when onboarding more than 15 devices.

approvedPolicies: Require manager approval for discounts above 10%.
Include itemized quote PDFs for all orders above $15,000.

agents.name: Catalog Agent
agents.summary: Selected an in-stock Dell laptop and attached 3-year onsite support based on customer memory.

agents.name: Risk Agent
agents.summary: No high-risk pricing or delivery issues found.

agents.name: Quote Writer Agent
agents.summary: Generated a customer-ready quote and internal rationale.

evidence.quoteSummary: 12 Dell Latitude 5440 devices with 3-year onsite support for $14,794.

agents.name: Learning Agent
agents.summary: Prepared to compare human edits against the agent proposal and propose reusable memory/policy updates.

quote.emailDraft:
Hi Mira,

Based on your Lagos office rollout, we recommend 12 Dell Latitude 5440 devices with 3-year onsite support. The approved quote total is $14,794 after an 8% rollout discount. Estimated delivery is 6 business days after approval.

Best,
Hive Corps
quote.internalRationale: Deterministic quote rationale based on catalog, margin, customer memory, and policy checks.

proposals: Applied customer preference for Dell Latitude plus 3-year support.

alibabaCloud.deploymentTarget: Alibaba Cloud ECS or Function Compute
